Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1011}...Hey, don't be like that. I know a place that'd be perfect for us, girl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Please, just leave us alone! We're not interested.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1012}One drink, that's all we're askin'. C'mon, it'll be fun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Leave them alone. You don't want the police to get involved, do you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1012}What, you wanna call the cops? Quit tryin' to act like a big man, you little punk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1011}Yeah, it's time for you to piss off![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1013}You got some slick moves. I bet you know how to fight, that right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1013}How about you and I go a few rounds? If ya ain't too busy, there's a spot around back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1013}Whenever I see guys who think they're hot shit, all I wanna do is put 'em in their place.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1013}I bet a lotta people call you a tough guy, so how 'bout we put it to the test?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1014}What, is he scared now? Hahahaha![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...See? I told you—nothing but trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1013}What!? You think you're gonna beat me just like that!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Don't worry, I won't go all out against an amateur. It's gotta be a fair fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Hey, over there! Break it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}...I told you, officer. They were the ones antagonizing us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1021}And I told you, we'll hear all about it down at the station.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1022}You're high school students, aren't you? We'll need your contact information to notify your parents about this.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}I'll handle these two. I've already cleared it with the brass.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}...I don't know what's going on here, but you better not be starting any trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}Then why'd we get a report from two ladies saying you were attacked by a group of punks?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}They wanted to test my strength. I was just giving them what they wanted.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}In the middle of a public street? You really need to think things through.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Heh, you didn't think we were in actual trouble, did you?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 0 25 25}Even if things got tense, I'd never put you in danger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}Then why'd we get a report from two ladies saying you were attacked by a group of punks?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}If you want to show off to your buddy, there's a time and place for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}Listen, I'm an officer of the law. I don't care who you are—anyone who disturbs the peace is gonna have to deal with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}As you can see, your friend here is a bit of a hothead.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}I know it won't be easy, but try and keep an eye on him, would you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Those are some bold words. But thanks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Don't worry about it. I know how to pick my battles.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}My arm's healed, and we've got way more dependable people now. There's no better time to test my strength.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}Especially now that we have someone like you. We really lucked out on that one.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}So I'm gonna keep honing my skills. That way, I can put down anyone I face with my own two hands.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}In any case, don't get in over your heads.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}I have a hunch the guys you ran into were from a gang that's been active around here recently.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}Just be careful. You don't wanna get on their bad side, because once you're on it, you'll never get off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1086 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1086}All right, it's late. You'd better head on home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}So much for eating out. It's been nonstop interruptions all night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}Kurosawa-san's right, though. We should probably head home. Sorry about this—I'll treat you some other time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}I'm gonna do some jogging on the way back. You wanna join?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}Good answer. It's dark, so watch out for cars.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}I'm gonna run ahead. You just follow at your own pace![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I ran back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like my stamina has improved[n]after running that long of a distance...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_HPUP_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Max HP increased by 5.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}You sure? You'd get home faster if you did.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}Well, I'm goin' ahead. Be careful on your way back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I saw Sanada off, then[n]went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My mind feels sharper after[n]seeing Sanada's stoic expression...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: PFM_SPUP_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}Max SP increased by 3.[n]{f 1 1}
